title: angelica aculeolata
intro: Angelica aculeolata, also known as Asian angelica or Dong quai, is a plant species native to East Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Angelica aculeolata include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Angelica aculeolata can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
